entries.title: Visual Timer – Custom Presets
entries.body: You can now save your own timer durations as one-tap presets. Perfect for morning routines, homework, or sensory breaks. Tap the ＋ button on the timer screen to add up to 5 presets.

entries.title: AAC Grid – Drag to Reorder Symbols
entries.body: Symbols in the AAC grid can now be rearranged by long-pressing and dragging. Your order is saved automatically across sessions.

entries.title: Emotion Journal – Crash on Delete Fixed
entries.body: Fixed a crash that occurred when deleting the last emotion entry in a session. Data is preserved and the app now handles empty state gracefully.

entries.title: Language Switching – Faster Reload
entries.body: Switching languages now takes under 200 ms instead of ~1.5 s. The language manager now caches translation bundles in memory after the first load.

entries.title: Keychain Storage Hardened
entries.body: Parent PIN and cached API credentials are now stored with the `.whenUnlocked` access policy, preventing them from being accessible when the device is locked by another process.

entries.title: Daily Routine – Notification Time Sync Fixed
entries.body: Routine notifications were firing one hour late for users in daylight-saving time zones. The schedule now uses calendar-aware triggers that respect DST transitions correctly.
